meta.title: Akuçar Logistics — Middle East Cross-Border Transport Specialist
meta.description: International transport specialized in Lebanon, Syria and the Middle East since 1985. Rooted expertise based in Hatay, Türkiye.

hero.title: The Middle East cross-border transport specialist
hero.subtitle: Deep-rooted experience across Lebanon, Syria and the Middle East. Trust that departs from Hatay and reaches beyond borders.

services.title: Expertise beyond borders
services.lead: With experience gathered on the Middle East route since 1985, we carry your cargo safely beyond borders.

lebanon.title: Lebanon Transport
lebanon.desc: Regular, secure service on the Beirut route.

syria.title: Syria Transport
syria.desc: Cross-border expertise to Damascus and beyond.

turkey.title: Domestic Transport
turkey.desc: Partial and full loads within Türkiye.

customs.title: Customs & Transit
customs.desc: Documents, customs and transit handled end-to-end.

jordan.title: Jordan Freight & Transport
jordan.desc: Road freight and transport from Türkiye to Jordan (Amman).

saudi.title: Saudi Arabia Freight & Transport
saudi.desc: Transport and freight to Riyadh, Jeddah and Dammam.

dubai.title: Dubai Freight & Transport
dubai.desc: Freight and transport from Türkiye to Dubai and the UAE.

qatar.title: Qatar Freight & Transport
qatar.desc: Reliable freight and transport from Türkiye to Qatar and Doha.

kuwait.title: Kuwait Freight & Transport
kuwait.desc: Road freight and transport from Türkiye to Kuwait.

serviceDetail.ctaTitle: Request a quote for your cargo
serviceDetail.ctaDesc: Tell us the origin, destination, cargo type and date; our team will get back to you shortly.

lebanon.intro: Regular, secure and trackable transport to Beirut and across Lebanon.
lebanon.body: On the Lebanon route we rely on years of local knowledge and a strong field network. Because we know the border processes closely, your cargo arrives complete and on time.
lebanon.f1: Regular schedule to Beirut and surroundings
lebanon.f2: Team experienced in border and customs processes

syria.intro: Rare, deep-rooted expertise in cross-border transport to Damascus and beyond.
syria.body: The Syria route requires special expertise; documents, routing and border processes are managed meticulously for every shipment. This is exactly where Akuçar makes the difference.
syria.f1: Transport to Damascus and the wider region

middleeast.intro: Integrated, end-to-end logistics across the Middle East.
middleeast.body: Through our strong network of regional partners, we manage your cargo from a single point even on multi-country routes. One contact from planning to delivery.

turkey.intro: Partial and full load transport across Türkiye.
turkey.body: For domestic shipments we combine speed and safety. Regular transport from our Hatay base to every corner of the country.

customs.intro: Customs, documentation and transit processes handled end-to-end.
customs.body: From export and import paperwork to customs procedures, warehousing and transit operations, we manage the entire process on your behalf. Complex bureaucracy is our business.

jordan.intro: Full and partial road transport and freight from Türkiye to Jordan, notably Amman.
jordan.body: On the Jordan route we run regular departures with a team that knows the region well. From our Hatay hub your cargo reaches Amman with border and customs processes planned carefully, and documentation, insurance and tracking handled from a single point.

saudi.intro: Full and partial road transport from Türkiye to Saudi Arabia, notably Riyadh, Jeddah and Dammam.
saudi.body: The Saudi Arabia route sits at the heart of Akuçar's strong Gulf corridor. Departing Hatay, your cargo reaches Riyadh, Jeddah and Dammam with TIR and customs handled meticulously, and documentation, insurance and tracking from a single contact.

dubai.intro: Full and partial road transport from Türkiye to Dubai and the United Arab Emirates, managed end to end.
dubai.body: On the Dubai route we run regular departures with a team experienced in TIR and customs. Departing from our Hatay hub, your cargo reaches Dubai on a planned route via Saudi Arabia and the Gulf, with documentation, insurance and tracking handled from a single point.

qatar.intro: Full and partial road transport from Türkiye to Qatar (Doha), backed by deep regional experience.
qatar.body: On the Qatar route we work with a team that knows Gulf transit well. From Hatay your cargo reaches Doha safely via Saudi transit, with customs, documentation and insurance managed by a single contact.

kuwait.intro: Full and partial road transport from Türkiye to Kuwait, managed end to end.
kuwait.body: On the Kuwait route we run regular departures with an experienced driver team. From our Hatay hub we plan the route via Saudi Arabia to Kuwait, handling customs, documentation and tracking from a single point.

homeAbout.title: Your trusted Middle East transport partner since 1985
homeAbout.body:
Ak Uçar International Transport was founded in Hatay under the lead of İbrahim Uçar, who has been in the transport sector since 1985. Today we are one of the leading companies in project and full-load transport on the Lebanon, Syria and Middle East corridor.

With a modern, young fleet, an expert team that knows border processes inside out, and decades of field experience, we deliver your cargo on time, complete and secure. Our goal is not merely to carry goods, but to be your single point of contact on every shipment.

We work to fully meet our customers' expectations, to create value through consistent quality, and to advance our regional expertise further every day.

corporate.title: On the road since 1985
corporate.lead: Ak Uçar International Transport is a family company that has turned its deep-rooted experience into expertise on the Middle East route.
corporate.p1: We set off in Hatay in 1985. Since then we have safely completed thousands of shipments across Lebanon, Syria and the Middle East. What sets us apart is our focus not on the roads everyone travels, but on the cross-border routes that demand special knowledge and trust.
corporate.p2: Today we operate with a modern fleet, an experienced team and a strong regional network. We treat every shipment as our own and stand by you as a single point of contact from planning to delivery.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be the first-recalled, most trusted Turkish company in Middle East cross-border transport.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To deliver cargo on time, complete and safe; to give peace of mind as a single point of contact.

quality.title: Quality Policy
quality.desc: The same diligence on every shipment; raising the standard through continuous improvement.

hr.title: Human Resources
hr.desc: A field-savvy team culture that pairs experience with young energy.

docs.title: Permits & certificates
docs.note: Documents are representative; current document images are shared on request.

fleet.title: A modern fleet for every load
fleet.lead: A broad vehicle park, from full and partial loads to cargo requiring special equipment.
fleet.typeDesc: Well-maintained, trackable vehicles suited to your cargo type.

references.lead: The organizations we have worked with for years are our greatest reference.
references.note: Logos are representative. Real client logos will be added soon.

items.q: How long does transport to Syria and Lebanon take?
items.a: It depends on the route, cargo type and border traffic. We give you a clear estimate at the quote stage.
Export/customs documents vary by cargo and country. We advise you throughout the entire paperwork process.
Cargo insurance is arranged on request; we clarify the details during the quote.
Yes. We offer both full and partial load options.
We provide regular updates throughout the shipment and you can stay in direct contact with the responsible person.

footer.tagline: The deep-rooted specialist in Middle East cross-border transport, based in Hatay.

team.title: The people behind the work
team.lead: A field-savvy, experienced team. Your cargo is in safe hands.

news.title: Industry News
news.lead: Current developments in logistics and transport from the sources we follow, plus announcements and news from Akuçar.

suriye-hatti-yeniden.title: We increased our capacity on the Syria route
suriye-hatti-yeniden.excerpt: In response to rising demand, we raised service frequency to Damascus and the wider region.
suriye-hatti-yeniden.body:
We increased our capacity on the Syria route in response to rising demand.

By raising service frequency to Damascus and the wider region, we shortened delivery times. With our experience in border processes, your cargo continues to arrive complete and on time.

filo-yenileme.title: New-generation tractor units join our fleet
filo-yenileme.excerpt: Fuel-efficient vehicles with tracking systems are now in service.
filo-yenileme.body:
We strengthened our fleet with new-generation tractor units.

Equipped with high fuel efficiency and real-time tracking, our new vehicles offer a safer and more transparent transport experience.

gumruk-surec-hizlandi.title: Digitalization in customs processes
gumruk-surec-hizlandi.excerpt: By digitalizing document management we reduced customs waiting times.
gumruk-surec-hizlandi.body:
We took steps toward digitalization in customs processes.

By moving document management to a digital environment, we significantly reduced customs waiting times. Our customers now complete processes faster and more predictably.

route.title: From Hatay beyond the borders
route.lead: The heart of our deep-rooted expertise: the cross-border line from Hatay to Beirut and Damascus.

quote.lead: Describe your shipment in a few steps; we'll get back with the best offer.
